explanation: The provided code compiles a list of URLs pointing to various course materials and educational resources for several subjects in computer science. It categorizes these resources by topic, such as advanced data structures and logic, and aims to serve as a centralized repository for students seeking additional learning materials.

files.content: integers : intro to course, predecessor/successor, via y-fast trees and van Emde Boas
dictionaries: worst-case queries, via FKS and cuckoo hashing

name: 2008-12-02_unnamed
subject: Course Websites - Summer Semester
summary: This project involves creating a collection of useful resources for students, specifically course websites related to advanced data structures, operating systems, and logic.
